title: E-mail connected by board

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, currently we have a mail connected with a board, let say we have 10 students with their email connected with their board, the problem is when use E-mail and Activities, it enlist all mails connected.
Please could give us option to show only or specific mails in each board?
Example, Board Peter connect with email of Peter, Board Anna connect with Email of Anna, when we open Board Peter/Update/E-mail and Activities, we only want to see Peter mail connected and use it, the Anna email should be hidden.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Kmk!

I hear what you’re saying here! If you were to filter the app to only show item related activities would this help? This way the app will only pull data from the specific email address that is connected to the emails column in the item (which would mean you’d need to have this column set up in your board):

Screen Shot 2023-04-24 at 11.56.44 am780×606 22.5 KB

Let me know what you think
